summary: Iteration 12: QR Code System Testing - 8/8 tests PASSED. All QR code features working correctly including landing page QR button, scan page, admin QR modal, agency page vehicles filtering, and registration with agency binding.

ui_bugs.issue: French accented characters display as Unicode escape sequences (e.g., 'caméra' shows as 'cam\u00e9ra', 'Réessayer' as 'R\u00e9essayer'). This is the same encoding issue from iteration_11.
data-testid attributes are not being rendered in the DOM. React Native Web does not automatically convert data-testid to HTML attributes. Need to use testID prop and configure Metro bundler.

test_1_landing_qr_button_visible.details: 'Scanner le QR de votre agence' button visible on landing page with QR icon and French subtitle 'Rejoignez votre agence en un scan'

test_2_scan_qr_page_navigation.details: Clicking QR button navigates to /scan-qr page. Shows 'Scanner le QR Code' header, camera loading message, and instruction 'Pointez votre caméra vers le QR code...'

test_3_admin_qr_button_on_agencies.details: Purple 'QR Code Client' button visible on each agency card in /admin/agencies. Super admin can see and access QR generation for LogiRent Geneva and LogiRent Lausanne.

test_4_admin_qr_modal.details: QR modal shows: 1) QR code SVG generated via react-qr-code, 2) Agency name 'LogiRent Geneva', 3) Instructions for printing, 4) Full URL displayed below QR, 5) 'Fermer' close button

test_5_agency_client_urls.details: Each agency card shows correct slug-based client URL (e.g., .../a/logirent-geneva, .../a/logirent-lausanne)

test_6_agency_page_vehicles_filtered.details: Agency page /a/logirent-geneva shows 'BIENVENUE CHEZ LogiRent Geneva' with location 'Geneva, Switzerland' and '11 disponibles' vehicles (filtered by agency_id)

test_7_agency_auth_buttons.details: 'Rejoignez LogiRent Geneva' section with 'Créer un compte' purple button and 'Déjà inscrit ? Se connecter' link visible for non-logged users

test_8_register_with_agency_binding.details: Click 'Créer un compte' navigates to /register?agency_id=...&agency_name=LogiRent%20Geneva. Registration page shows 'Rejoignez LogiRent Geneva' subtitle confirming agency context.

action_items: EXISTING ISSUE: French Unicode characters still showing as escape sequences on scan-qr page. Same issue as iteration_11 - needs Metro/babel config fix.
OPTIONAL: Add Metro config or babel transform to properly pass testID/data-testid to DOM for better testing support in React Native Web.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR code system fully working: 1) Landing page has QR scan button that navigates to /scan-qr, 2) Admin can generate QR codes from /admin/agencies for each agency, 3) Agency pages (/a/slug) show filtered vehicles and auth buttons, 4) Registration preserves agency context via URL params. Note: French Unicode encoding issue persists from iteration_11.
